asset.title: Wiki Note Grounding
asset.purpose: Silent workflow preview generated from app captures or trace replays. Judge whether it communicates the workflow and gate clearly.

judge.summary: The workflow preview successfully demonstrates the integration of collaborative notes, spreadsheets, and multi-agent execution traces within the NodeRoom environment, showing the grounding of wiki notes into structured spreadsheet data.

featureClarity.evidence: Shows the transition from a text-based diligence note to a structured spreadsheet sync, though the transition is rapid.

workflowCompleteness.evidence: Captures the initial note state, the agent interaction, and the resulting spreadsheet updates with trace logs.

visualDesign.evidence: Clean dark-mode UI with consistent panel layouts, though dense with information.

consistency.evidence: Perfectly aligns with NodeRoom's core concepts of public/private agents, spreadsheets, notes, and execution traces.

evidenceQuality.evidence: Authentic UI capture showing realistic financial data, agent logs, and system traces.

legibility.evidence: Small font sizes in the chat and trace logs may be difficult to read on smaller screens without zooming.

professionalRelevance.evidence: Highly relevant for financial analysts and developers building multi-agent collaborative workflows.

productionHonesty.evidence: Accurately represents the system's state transitions and trace outputs without artificial embellishments.

observedEvidence: Diligence note tab showing sync reliability guidelines
Spreadsheet tab showing financial rows (Revenue, COGS, Gross Profit)
Room trace panel displaying agent execution logs
Public and private agent chat panels

defects.observed: Dense text in the Room Trace and chat panels is hard to read at standard README display resolutions.
defects.fix: Increase the default zoom level of the browser during capture to make text elements larger.

judge.suggestedReadmeCaption: NodeRoom's Wiki Note Grounding workflow: seamlessly syncing unstructured diligence notes into structured, version-controlled spreadsheets with full agent execution traces.
